calendar.label: Google Calendar
calendar.note: Subscribe with the "Add to Google Calendar" link on the calendar page.

calendar-subscribe.description: Subscribe directly with Google Calendar (requires login).

ical.label: Subscribe to Calendar without Google Account
ical.description: Copy and paste the URL into your calendar app as a new subscription. Or download the link for a one time snapshot of events.
